parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO linkedin_posts (id, page_db_id, author_urn, content, url, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  (SELECT id FROM linkedin_pages_monitored WHERE urn = '{{ $json.author_urn }}' LIMIT 1),
  '{{ $json.author_urn }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content
RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO linkedin_pages_monitored (urn, name, type, feed_url, active)
SELECT val->>'urn', val->>'name', val->>'type', val->>'feed_url', true
FROM json_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.pages) }}'::json) AS val
ON CONFLICT (urn) 
DO UPDATE SET feed_url = EXCLUDED.feed_url, name = EXCLUDED.name, active = true;
